domain.description: Base domain used by the instance

slave-amount.description: Total amount of Slaves allocated to the Instance (include blocked ones)

accepted-slave-amount.description: Amount of Slaves allocated to the Instance which are deployed

rejected-slave-amount.description: Rejected Amount of Slaves allocated to the Instance which are not deployed

rejected-slave-dict.description: Dict of slaves which were rejected. Keys are slave references, values are lists of errors on slaves.

rejected-slave-url.description: URL exposing the list of rejected slaves.

publish-failsafe-error-promise-url.description: URL exposing failsafe publication errors of the slaves.

publish-slave-sqlite-validation-database.description: URL to the sqlite database used to validate the published slave list.

warning-list.description: List of warnings found during the request.

warning-slave-dict.description: Dict of slaves which got warnings. Keys are slave references, values are lists of warnings on slaves.

monitor-setup-url.description: URL to setup the monitor in a monitoring client

master-key-generate-auth-url.description: URL to GET once auth for master-key-upload-url

master-key-upload-url.description: URL to PUT PEM bundle of main certificate and key

kedifa-caucase-url.description: Url to caucase used by KeDiFa.

kedifa-csr-url.description: URL on which KeDiFa publishes its CSR sent to caucase. Published only when automatic internal kedifa caucase CSR is disabled.

kedifa-csr-certificate.description: Certificate used to serve data on kedifa-csr-url. Published only when automatic internal kedifa caucase CSR is disabled.

backend-client-caucase-url.description: URL to caucase used by authentication to the backend.

^frontend-node-[0-9]+-backend-haproxy-st.description: URL on which frontend node number N publishes the backend HAProxy statistics.

^frontend-node-[0-9]+-node-information-j.description: JSON describing frontend node number N.

^frontend-node-[0-9]+-trafficserver-intr.description: URL on which frontend node number N exposes Traffic Server introspection.

^frontend-node-[0-9]+-kedifa-csr-url$.description: URL on which frontend node number N publishes its Kedifa CSR sent to caucase. Published only when automatic internal kedifa caucase CSR is disabled.

^frontend-node-[0-9]+-backend-client-csr.description: URL on which frontend node number N publishes its Backend Client CSR sent to caucase. Published only when automatic internal backend client caucase CSR is disabled.

^frontend-node-[0-9]+-csr-certificate$.description: Certificate used to serve data on the CSR URLs of frontend node number N. Published only when automatic internal CSR is disabled.
